text.title: Internal Linking Graph Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping page count, cluster definitions, hub assignment, CMS access, and audit emptiness to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the site have ≥30 indexed pages, clusters defined, and CMS access?

conclusion.verdict: SKIP — site too small or no edit access

branch.when: any cluster has <4 spokes after merge

conclusion.verdict: BLOCK — merge or drop tiny clusters
BLOCK — pick one hub per cluster
BLOCK — add sibling inbound to each spoke
BLOCK — diversify anchors to ≥3 surface forms
BLOCK — move hub link into spoke body

text.example: 120 pages + 6 clusters + 1 hub each + ≥4 spokes + all audit lists empty after fixes → APPROVE.
